summary: Foundation spec pack is complete and implementation-ready for domain specification work. Discovery precedence and all ten confirmed answers are mapped to decisions; the latest review's testability, glossary, trace-sequencing, risk-traceability, and readiness findings are resolved; SPECS.md contains the complete Foundation and M0-M11 roadmap plus the full domain template. One legal-notice value remains a non-blocking clarification and is governed by safe Assumption D-016, which blocks public packaging rather than inventing a holder or year.

open_questions.text: What exact copyright year and legal holder name must appear in the root MIT LICENSE and packaged copies?
open_questions.why_it_matters: The MIT license choice is accepted, but repository metadata is not authoritative legal identity data; public packages must contain a final owner-approved notice.
open_questions.unlocks: Completion of the public-packaging portion of the M0 governance and release gate.
options: Supply the exact legal holder name and copyright year for all root and packaged MIT notices.
Have the release owner obtain counsel-approved notice wording before public packaging.
open_questions.default: Do not infer or ship placeholder values; require owner-supplied holder and year in specs/11-governance-release.md and block public packaging until both are supplied.
